basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./ 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology
qualification.details: B.Sc. or 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: B.Sc. or 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant position is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology to be eligible for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, plus 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Kanpur Project Assistant recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an offline and/or online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
